title: White Gloss Metal Aerosol Spray Paint (250 ml) 1 Piece - Fast Drying, Perfect for Home Projects, Exterior & Interior Applications
features: STUNNING GLOSS FINISH: Elevate your projects with a brilliant white gloss finish that provides a clean, polished look. Perfect for reviving or transforming any item to make it stand out.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Packaged in a durable metal aerosol can with a PP nozzle and lid, ensuring your gloss spray paint remains effective till the last drop. No more struggling with low-quality cans that fail to deliver consistent results.

FAST DRYING FORMULA: Say goodbye to long wait times. Our spray paint is fast drying, allowing you to complete your DIY projects in no time. Move quickly from prep to finish without the lengthy drying pauses.

VERSATILE USE: This 250 ml can of white gloss spray paint is perfect for adding a vibrant coat to both indoor and outdoor creations. Whether you're transforming furniture or refreshing your garden fence, this paint has you covered.

AMP YOUR CREATIVITY: Don't limit yourself to just painting walls or furniture. Our spray paint is perfect for adding a pop of color to various surfaces such as metal, plastic, and more. Let your imagination run wild and elevate your creativity.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality can of white gloss spray paint contains 250ml of paint that is perfect for wood, brick and metal. Safety Warning No warning applicable
